title: Chest X-ray result review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports clinician-selected blood tests, chest radiography, peak-flow diary, pulmonary function testing, sputum testing, ECG, and specialist-led advanced imaging.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-selected blood tests, chest radiography, peak-flow diary, pulmonary function testing, sputum testing, ECG, and specialist-led advanced imaging.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-selected blood tests, chest radiography, peak-flow diary, pulmonary function testing, sputum testing, ECG, and specialist-led advanced imaging.

assessment.text: Supports no routine post-inpatient follow-up radiograph, consideration at 6 weeks for smoking, age over 50, persistent or deteriorating symptoms, or unexplained weight loss, and shared decision-making using recent imaging, comorbidity, frailty, prognosis, treatment options, and preferences.
assessment.rationale: Supports qualified follow-up chest radiography after pneumonia for chest radiograph result review; no decision is generated.

source.title: Pneumonia: diagnosis and management
source.population: Children, young people, and adults with community- or hospital-acquired pneumonia, subject to recommendation-specific setting and age qualifiers.
source.setting: First contact, primary care, hospital, community treatment, reassessment, and post-discharge follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected pneumonia recovery, reassessment, observations, and post-inpatient chest-radiograph fields; international guidance requires UAE clinician review and the legacy workflow does not enforce every age or discharge qualifier.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports no routine post-inpatient follow-up radiograph, consideration at 6 weeks for smoking, age over 50, persistent or deteriorating symptoms, or unexplained weight loss, and shared decision-making using recent imaging, comorbidity, frailty, prognosis, treatment options, and preferences.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-selected blood tests, chest radiography, peak-flow diary, pulmonary function testing, sputum testing, ECG, and specialist-led advanced imaging.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-selected chest-radiograph review in cough assessment for chest radiograph result review; no decision is generated.
